block_0: A year of fighting the global semiconductor shortage
block_1: Despite ranking as the worst-hit industry in 2021, auto stocks may be interesting for traders that seek out assets with increased volatility. Affected by the global chip shortage, the automotive industry lost billions of dollars and is yet to recover.
block_2: How did auto stocks perform last year and what awaits them in 2022? When will the global chip shortage end and how will that affect semiconductor manufacturers?
block_3: If you are curious, check out our thorough analysis and make notes of the stocks that caught your eye.
